resources.string: Allows another app to read opted-in saved locations and cached forecasts from ZeusWatch.
Tap to open and load a live forecast.
Tap to load the latest forecast and next few days.
Tap to load current conditions, hourly changes, and the 5-day outlook.
Tap to load the next few hours.
Save favorite places, then tap to refresh this list.
Live forecast. Tap to refresh now.
Data updated %1$s ago. Tap to refresh now.
Pick the forecast this widget should keep in view. You can always add more widgets for other places later.
Tapping a location finishes setup immediately and keeps this widget focused on that place.
Uses ZeusWatch\'s current or last loaded location so the widget stays in sync.
You can finish setup with the app location now, then save favorite places inside ZeusWatch to pin more widgets later.
Choose a specific place when you want a dedicated home-screen forecast.
Create personal forecast triggers for heat, cold, wind, rain, and UV.
Create a rule for heat, low temperatures, heavy rain, strong wind, or high UV so ZeusWatch can watch the forecast for you.
ZeusWatch checks this rule against the forecast and only notifies you when the threshold is met.
Enter a numeric threshold to save this alert.
This threshold can\'t be negative. Enter zero or higher.
Choose the basics once, then tune everything later in Settings.
ZeusWatch uses location permission to find your forecast, local alerts, radar position, and saved-place defaults.
The permission prompt appears on the main screen. You can allow once, allow while using the app, or search for a place manually.
This sets the full measurement bundle so wind, pressure, precipitation, and visibility match your temperature choice.
Uses °F, mph, inHg, inches, and miles.
Uses °C, km/h, hPa, millimeters, and kilometers.
Start focused or turn everything on. Card visibility and order remain fully editable.
Current summary, rain next hour, hourly, daily, radar, and details.
The balanced ZeusWatch default with core weather, air quality, pollen, astronomy, and trends.
Enable every available card for a dense power-user dashboard.
A few recent upgrades are ready for the next time you check the forecast.

string-array.name: whats_new_items
string-array.item: Forecast detail sheets now open from hourly and daily rows.
Locations remembers recent searches and keeps My Location one tap away.
EXTREME weather alerts now use a stronger safety takeover.

resources.string: 1 custom alert ready to watch the forecast.
%1$d custom alerts ready to watch the forecast.
Max wind gust in the next 12 hours
Total precipitation in the next 24 hours
Total snowfall in the next 24 hours
Current US EPA air quality index
Life-threatening weather: tornado warnings, tsunami warnings, etc.
Severe thunderstorm warnings, blizzard warnings, flood warnings, etc.
Special weather statements and minor advisories.
Proactive notifications when rain is about to start or stop at your current location.
Health-related weather alerts: migraine pressure triggers, respiratory humidity, joint pain temperature swings.
Notifications for thresholds you set yourself (temperature, wind, rain, UV).
Active weather alerts in your area
Persistent notification showing current weather conditions
Send a sanitized crash log by email? No API keys or coordinates are included.
Share what you see right now. Reports are anonymous, help nearby users, and cannot be edited after sending.
Location is rounded to a nearby area. Reports expire after two hours; backend deletion is asynchronous and may occur later.
Report submitted. Thanks for helping nearby users.
We couldn\'t send that report right now. Check your connection and try again.
Solar irradiance: GHI %1$d watts per square meter, DNI %2$d watts per square meter, daily estimate %3$s kilowatt hours per square meter.
Marine conditions: wave height %1$s meters, wave period %2$s seconds, direction %3$d degrees.
Flood risk: %1$s. Current river discharge %2$s cubic meters per second, mean %3$s.
Climate outlook: projected 2050 average high %1$s degrees, baseline %2$s degrees, change %3$s degrees.
Rain bands and storm movement appear here when map data is ready.
Track precipitation movement with the full interactive view.
Better for storm timing, rain coverage, and checking nearby cells.
Fetching the latest radar frames for this area.
We couldn\'t load supported RainViewer past radar frames right now. Try again or switch radar providers.
Reconnect to resume live radar, lightning, and community weather reports.
Forecast cards still work with cached data
Straight-line corridor estimate • assumes %1$d km/h • not navigation-grade distance or duration.
Imported GPX geometry • assumes %1$d km/h for ETA • not navigation guidance.
%1$d weather samples unavailable; available samples are preserved.
Weather is unavailable for this point. Other route samples remain visible.
Enter an origin or use a map location.
Route weather is unavailable right now.
Shared route link did not include a readable origin or destination.
GPX files must be 5 MB or smaller.
GPX files may contain at most 10,000 route or track points.
This GPX file contains blocked DTD or external-entity markup.
Choose a valid GPX 1.1 route or track with at least two points.
Daily forecast details will appear here when new forecast data arrives.
Warmest around %1$s at %2$s. Rain risk peaks %3$s.
Warmest around %1$s at %2$s. The week looks fairly steady overall.
Hourly details will appear here when new forecast data arrives.
Temperatures range from %1$s to %2$s over the next %3$d hours.
Feels-like swings run about %1$d° away from the air temperature at their strongest.
Feels-like temperatures stay close to the actual air temperature for most of this stretch.
Peak winds reach %1$s with gusts up to %2$s.
Rain risk stays fairly low through this window.
Mostly clear skies dominate this stretch.
Skies stay partly cloudy for much of this stretch.
Cloud cover stays elevated for a good part of the day.
Expect mostly overcast skies through this stretch.
Humidity runs between %1$d%% and %2$d%% over the next %3$d hours.
Comparing the latest Open-Meteo model runs.
Recent model runs are not ready for this location yet.
Forecast evolution. Latest run compared with previous run. Average temperature shift %1$s. Average rain risk shift %2$s.
Fetching 24-hour temperature and precipitation from alternate sources.
At least two forecast sources are needed for this location.
Provider agreement. %1$s across %2$d providers. Temperature spread %3$s. Precipitation spread %4$s.
Waiting for the next one-minute station observation.
Enable this card after adding a Tempest access token and device ID in Settings > Data Sources.
The station did not return a live observation yet. Check the token, device ID, and network connection.
Tempest station observation. Temperature %1$s, humidity %2$s, wind %3$s. Observed %4$s.
Show how past forecasts compared to observed highs
Show ensemble spread on the temperature graph
A fast read on moisture, light, pressure, and visibility so the rest of the forecast is easier to act on.
Updated from current conditions and the near-term daily outlook.
Acceptable. May be a risk for sensitive groups.
Sensitive groups may experience health effects.
Everyone may begin to experience health effects.
Health alert: increased risk of health effects for everyone.
May cause dry skin and irritation
Pollen readings are low or unavailable for this location right now.
Cloud cover. Currently %1$d%%, %2$s. Next 24 hours between %3$d%% and %4$d%%.
Visibility chart. Current visibility %1$s, %2$s. Next 24 hours range from %3$s to %4$s.
The shaded band shows the likely low-to-high range from ensemble models.
This is the 10th-to-90th percentile range from ensemble model runs. A wider range means the forecast is less certain.
Estimated safe sun exposure without SPF: %1$d minutes.
Precipitation forecast chart. No rain expected.
Precipitation forecast chart. Chance up to %1$d percent.
Precipitation forecast chart. Chance up to %1$d percent at %2$s.
Sunshine duration chart. %1$s of sunshine today, %2$d percent of available daylight.
Sun path chart. Sunrise %1$s, sunset %2$s. %3$s. Moonrise %4$s, moonset %5$s.
Rain next hour chart. %1$s. Peak %2$s at %3$s.
Outdoor activity score %1$d out of 100, %2$s. Factor scores: temperature %3$d, wind %4$d, rain %5$d, UV %6$d, humidity %7$d.
Wind compass. Wind from %1$s at %2$s. Gusts up to %3$s.
Wind forecast chart. Peak %1$s at %2$s. Gusts up to %3$s.
On this day. %1$d-year average high %2$s. Record high %3$s, record low %4$s. Today\'s forecast is %5$s.
Historical data unavailable for this location.
Prior-year highs for this date, ranging from %1$s to %2$s.
Thunderstorms may produce strong winds, hail, or tornadoes.
Can burn paw pads in seconds. Walk on grass or wait until evening.
Test pavement with your hand. If too hot for you, it\'s too hot for paws.
Keep pets indoors with water and AC. Do not leave in vehicles.
High heat stress risk for pets.
Limit outdoor time. Provide shade and fresh water. Watch for panting.
Warm and humid - monitor pets outdoors.
Brachycephalic breeds (pugs, bulldogs) are especially vulnerable.
Frostbite risk on ears, paws, and tail. Keep outdoor time under 5 minutes.
Very cold - limit pet outdoor time.
Small dogs and short-haired breeds need a coat. Check paws for ice buildup.
Chilly for small or short-haired pets.
Consider a sweater for sensitive breeds.
Create a safe space. Consider calming aids if your pet is storm-sensitive.
ZeusWatch needs your location to show local weather conditions.
Unable to connect. Check your internet connection.
Something went wrong. Pull to refresh.
Search for a city, ZIP code, or region to build a shortlist for widgets, alerts, and quick switching.
%1$d saved places ready for quick switching, widgets, and alerts.
Long-press a handle to reorder your favorites.
Search for a city, ZIP code, or region above to build a shortlist you can jump between anytime.
Search city, ZIP code, or region
Search failed. Check your connection and try again.
This removes %1$s from saved places. Widgets, alerts, and shortcuts that used it may need a new location.
Loading your saved places and the latest forecast context.
Pick two saved places and spot the differences that matter fastest.
Choose two saved places to compare right now.
Add a location to start comparing
Save at least two places to see side-by-side weather, travel differences, and rain risk in one glance.
%1$s is ready. Save one more place to unlock side-by-side comparisons.
Something went wrong while comparing locations.
Couldn\'t load weather for %1$s. Check your connection and try again.
Pulling fresh forecast data for both locations now.
%1$d saved places available for side-by-side weather decisions.
Compare provider temperature lines and rain risk for the primary location.
Source overlay needs at least two hourly forecasts for this location.
Source overlay for %1$s: %2$s. Maximum temperature spread %3$s. Maximum precipitation spread %4$d percentage points.
Current location can take a few seconds. You can jump into %1$s or choose another place manually.
Current location can take a few seconds. Choose a city manually if you want to skip GPS.
Still checking your current position. You can open %1$s instead or choose another saved place.
Still checking your current position. Choose a city manually if GPS is taking too long.
Current location can take a few seconds
Showing the latest cached forecast until your connection returns.
ZeusWatch v%1$s \u2022 Forecast data from Open-Meteo
Minute-by-minute precipitation data is not available for this location right now.
The forecast is current, but air quality did not update for this location.
The forecast is current, but pollen data did not update for this location.
The latest forecast no longer meets your health alert thresholds.
Tune the forecast, visuals, alerts, and data sources around how you use ZeusWatch.
%1$s. Swipe categories to move faster, then expand only the sections you want to change.
Choose the overall visual style, iconography, and forecast voice.

Windy is the default for new installs. LibreWXR Native keeps FOSS in-app playback with higher zoom, Viper HD tiles, and nowcast. RainViewer Native remains the conservative fallback with past radar only, max zoom 7, and Universal Blue tiles. NWS options open official U.S. radar pages.
Decide what shows on the Today screen and which insights stay closest to the top.
Turn cards on or off, then nudge favorites higher.
Control which weather changes can interrupt you and how proactive ZeusWatch should be.
Android notifications are blocked for ZeusWatch. Turn them on to receive severe weather alerts and the persistent forecast notification.
Background checks for severe weather alerts
Check alerts for all your locations, not just the current one
Show the current temperature as the notification icon in the status bar
Send one calm forecast summary each morning
Scheduled from this device\'s local time
Set thresholds for temperature, wind, rain, UV
Custom Alert Rules, set thresholds for temperature, wind, rain, and UV
Surface extra forecast detail when you want more context than the default view.
Show warmer/cooler trend in the hero header
Show the blended comfort score card
Show snowfall rate and depth cards when available
Show thunderstorm instability and CAPE cards
Include photography-friendly sunrise and sunset windows
Show total sunshine progress when forecast data supports it
More data, slightly larger API response
Enable weather-sensitive warnings for migraines, air quality, and other comfort impacts.
Keep the interface readable, comfortable, and calm in different conditions.
Vibration feedback when alerts are shown
Front-load alerts, current conditions, and forecast for faster TalkBack navigation
Dial ambient motion up or down to match your preferred level of energy.
Rain, snow, and sun ray animations
Pick the providers and fallbacks ZeusWatch uses for forecasts, alerts, and air quality.
Use Open-Meteo\'s binary SDK format for the main forecast and fall back to JSON if decoding fails.
Send current weather to compatible Gadgetbridge watches after each refresh.
Expose saved locations and cached forecasts to apps with the ZeusWatch provider permission. External queries never fetch live weather.
Local provider history for fallback troubleshooting. No locations, URLs, API keys, or raw errors are stored.
No provider checks recorded yet. Refresh weather once to populate this panel.
Diagnostics export failed. Check storage access and try again.
%1$s, %2$s. Last success: %3$s. Last failure: %4$s. Failure class: %5$s. Cache age: %6$s. Fallback: %7$s.
Power-user controls for cache behavior and provider troubleshooting.
Export preferences, card layout, custom alerts, custom summary templates, and saved locations. API keys are not included; imports are limited to 1 MB for safety.
Backup v%1$d will replace %2$d saved locations with %3$d, restore %4$d custom alerts, apply %5$d card settings, and restore last location: %6$s.
%1$d saved locations have blank names and will be skipped.
%1$d saved locations have invalid coordinates and will be skipped.
%1$d duplicate saved locations will be skipped.
Some source selections are temporarily unavailable and will use the safe default instead.
Keep ZeusWatch open while the settings file is being processed.
Export failed. Check storage access and try again.
Settings restored with %1$d saved locations and %2$d custom alerts.
Import failed. Choose a valid ZeusWatch backup under 1 MB and try again.
Version and project details for support, trust, and troubleshooting.
No analytics, no tracking, no data collection. API keys are encrypted on-device and never leave your phone.
Some manufacturers restrict background work to save battery. Exempt ZeusWatch to keep widgets fresh.
Settings → Battery → Battery optimization → All apps → ZeusWatch → Don\'t optimize
Settings → Battery → App battery saver → ZeusWatch → No restrictions. Also: Settings → Permissions → Autostart → enable ZeusWatch
Settings → Battery → App launch → ZeusWatch → Manage manually → enable all three toggles
Settings → Battery → Battery optimization → ZeusWatch → Don\'t optimize
Settings → Battery → High power consumption → add ZeusWatch. Also check: Settings → App management → ZeusWatch → Battery usage → Allow background activity
Settings → Battery → Battery optimization → All apps → ZeusWatch → Don\'t optimize. Usually not needed — stock Android respects WorkManager schedules.
Stored on this device and saved when you leave the field
No icon packs installed. Place packs in assets/iconpacks/ or install an app with the com.sysadmindoc.nimbus.ICON_PACK intent.
Past-only RainViewer playback with max zoom 7, Universal Blue PNG tiles, lightning, and overlays.
FOSS radar playback with max zoom 12, Viper HD PNG tiles, nowcast, lightning, and overlays.
Official NOAA/NWS interactive radar for U.S. regions and stations.
Radar: RainViewer \u2022 past only \u2022 max zoom 7 \u2022 Universal Blue
Radar: LibreWXR \u2022 past + nowcast \u2022 max zoom 12 \u2022 Viper HD
Radar: LibreWXR unavailable \u2022 using RainViewer fallback \u2022 max zoom 7
Radar: cached RainViewer frames \u2022 past only \u2022 max zoom 7
Radar: cached LibreWXR frames \u2022 past + nowcast \u2022 max zoom 12
Radar: cached RainViewer fallback \u2022 LibreWXR unavailable \u2022 max zoom 7
Black ice likely. Roads may be slippery.
Near-freezing with high humidity. Watch for icy patches.
Fog possible with high humidity and narrow dewpoint spread.
Very low visibility (<1 km). Use fog lights.
Heavy rain. Risk of hydroplaning at highway speeds.
Dangerous winds. Avoid driving if possible.
Strong winds may affect vehicle handling.
Snow or freezing rain. Roads will be hazardous.
Light snow or ice. Roads may be slippery.
Rapid pressure change detected — migraine trigger likely.
Barometric pressure changed by %1$s hPa within a 3-hour window in the next 12 hours. Consider taking preventive medication.
Moderate pressure change ahead — possible migraine trigger.
Barometric pressure changed by %1$s hPa over the next few hours.
Rapid weather changes ahead — migraine trigger likely.
Temperature swing of %1$d\u00B0C and humidity change of %2$d%% in the next 6 hours suggests a weather front approaching.
Moderate weather changes ahead — possible migraine trigger.
Temperature and humidity shifts detected in the next 6 hours.
May aggravate respiratory conditions such as asthma or COPD. Stay hydrated and limit strenuous outdoor activity.
Dry air may irritate airways and sinuses. Consider using a humidifier indoors.
Rapid temperature changes may worsen joint pain and arthritis symptoms. Dress in layers and stay warm during colder periods.
May affect sensitive individuals with joint conditions.
Live weather particle effects over your wallpaper
Location permission required to show weather.
Turn on location services to load local weather.
Unable to determine location. Move outdoors or check location services, then try again.
Server took too long to respond
Could not connect to weather service
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Choose a location to get started.
Heavy winter coat, insulated layers, thermal underwear
Winter coat with warm layers underneath
Warm jacket or fleece with a base layer
with rain likely throughout the day
with a slight chance of rain
Current conditions and next-hour rain risk from the ZeusWatch cache.
Smartspacer weather requires Android 10 or newer.
